rulesStrings.li: curiosity_opening_body->It arrives in scattered records — a partial text referencing something that should not exist. [pawn_nameDef], whose best skill is [pc_skill_best_label] at level [pc_skill_best_level], [pc_lex_verb_curiosity].\n\n[pc_lex_scene].

craft_opening_body->The design arrived without a name attached. [pawn_nameDef] — former [pc_backstory_adult_title], [pc_skill_best_label] at [pc_skill_best_level] — has been thinking about exactly this.\n\n[pawn_pronoun] [pc_lex_verb_craft], [pc_lex_scene].

scholar_opening_body->Among old records is a single fragment — referencing a body of work [pawn_nameDef] has spent years trying to locate. [pc_lex_identity_echo], with [pc_skill_best_label] at [pc_skill_best_level].\n\n[pawn_pronoun] [pc_lex_verb_curiosity].

healer_success_body->The treatment worked. [pawn_nameDef] did not exhale until the patient stabilised.

[pc_skill_best_label] at [pc_skill_best_level] was enough, this time.

[pawn_namedef] sat beside the bed, [pc_lex_scene], and watched the saved patients breath.

craft_success_body->The final piece goes in. [pawn_nameDef] steps back and looks.

It works. [pc_skill_best_label] at [pc_skill_best_level] made manifest.

[pawn_pronoun] gets to work on the account of it. Someone else should be able to build this too.

craft_failure_body->Something was wrong at a level [pawn_nameDef] did not catch in time. [pc_skill_best_label] at [pc_skill_best_level] was not enough.

The record will be thorough — [pawn_pronoun] is very thorough when [pawn_pronoun] is angry at [pawn_possessive]self.

[pawn_pronoun] returns to [pc_colony_name], [pc_lex_scene].
